info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 10.469 Cidra ityatra 'karReti DAtvantaramityanye' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apakarRya mahIpAlo mantriRo mantrakovidAn' (bf0 ka0 ko0 854) apakarRya= anAkarRya
'yAtrApahftacetastvAttadvAkyamavakarRayan' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 376) avakarRayan anAkarRayanniva avaSabda iha SravaRakriyAyAM nyUnatAmAha sTAne'sya prayoga iti nandati naScetaH
